"C:/Users/zaros/OneDrive/Desktop/Scrin", "cf.first.check.clang-format": "false", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "com.android.tools.idea.streaming.emulator.frame.visible": "false", "com.google.services.firebase.aqiPopupShown": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "new__desing", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "last_directory_selection": "D:/Work/_Project/ferma_compose2/app/build/generated/ksp/debug/java/com/zaroslikov/fermacompose2", "last_opened_file_path": "C:/Users/zaros/OneDrive/Desktop", "project.structure.last.edited": "Modules", "project.structure.proportion": "0.17", "project.structure.side.proportion": "0.2", "run.code.analysis.last.selected.profile": "pProject Default", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "memory.settings", "two.files.diff.last.used.file": "D:/Work/_Project/ferma_compose2/data/src/main/java/com/zaroslikov/data/room/converter/CategoryConverter.kt" }, "keyToStringList": { "ExportApk.BuildVariants": [ "release" ], "com.android.tools.idea.sqlite.queryhistory": [ "SELECT base.count AS count, base.suffix AS suffix FROM ( SELECT count AS count, count_suffix AS suffix FROM add_table WHERE idPT = '1' AND title = '22' UNION ALL SELECT -count AS count, count_suffix as suffix FROM sale_table WHERE idPT = '1' AND title = '22' and animal_count_id IS NULL and animal_id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT -count AS count, count_suffix as suffix FROM write_off_table WHERE idPT = '1' AND title = '22' and animal_count_id IS NULL ) AS base ", "SELECT title, count, suffix FROM ( SELECT title, count , suffix FROM ( SELECT title, count as count, count_suffix AS suffix FROM add_table WHERE idPT='1' UNION All SELECT title, -count as count, count_suffix AS suffix FROM sale_table WHERE idPT='1' and animal_count_id IS NULL and animal_id IS NULL UNION All SELECT title, -count as count, count_suffix AS suffix FROM write_off_table WHERE idPT='1' and animal_count_id IS NULL) )", "SELECT b.title as name_bookmarl, t.time, t.note, t.bookmark_id, i.idPT as project_id FROM time_notification_table t INNER JOIN bookmark_incubator b ON b.id = t.bookmark_id INNER JOIN incubator_table i ON i.id = b.idPT WHERE b.is_activity_bookmark = 1", "SELECT * FROM bookmark_incubator WHERE is_activity_bookmark = 1 and idPT ='2'", "
 WITH FirstRow AS (
 SELECT *
 FROM animal_count_table
 WHERE animal_id = '1'
 ORDER BY DATE(printf('%04d-%02d-%02d', substr(date, 7, 4), substr(date, 4, 2), substr(date, 1, 2))) DESC, id DESC
 LIMIT 1
 ),
 Calculation AS (
 SELECT
 CASE
 WHEN (SELECT version FROM FirstRow) IS NULL THEN
 COALESCE( (SELECT count FROM FirstRow), 0)
 ELSE
 COALESCE((SELECT SUM(
 CASE
 WHEN version IN (1, 4) THEN count
 WHEN version IN (0, 2, 3) THEN -count
 ELSE 0
 END
 ) FROM animal_count_table WHERE animal_id = '1'), 0)
 END AS calculatedCount
 )
 SELECT 
 id,
 (SELECT calculatedCount FROM Calculation) AS count,
 suffix,
 date,
 animal_id,
 note,
 version
 FROM FirstRow
" ], "com.intellij.ide.scratch.ScratchImplUtil$2/New Scratch File": [ "KND" ] } }
